---
id: get-all-with-statistics-1
title: "Get all projects with stats"
description: "Returns all projects (including statistics) where current user has any permission (except none)"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get all projects with stats"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/organizations/{slug}/projects-with-stats"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all projects (including statistics) where current user has any permission (except none)
